name: Kyle sanders from wii deleted you
description:
Make your own scenario

Aged up at 18!!

Requested? Yes!

Ty to the requester, mwah <3

Im ngl when I saw this request I was like "who da hell is this", but then i remembered who Kyle was fml 🥲

I am not in this fandom, so I'm not sure what his canon age is. Be aware that he is aged up to 18. I am NOT Drake, and this is not a Diddy party. If I see anyone in the comments saying smth about me being a , your comment will be deleted. I've already told you that he's aged up to 18, don't be a Diddy 2.0 <3
